notes: Needs revalidation after the 2026-05-20 migration from fixed global coordinates to window-scoped OCR.
The search-box click point is now window-relative.
The result activation targets the Cure For Me OCR anchor inside the resolved NetEaseMusic window.
The result double-click is validated with click_interval_ms=80; without an interval, the app observed the multi-click sequence unreliably.
This case should be treated as fixed-layout coverage, not as semantic music selection.
